title: My New Roommate at the Student Dormitory
text:
My name is Leo. I am 18 years old, and I am a student at Greenhill College. I live in a student dormitory near my school. My room is small, but it is clean and comfortable.

This month, I have a new roommate. His name is Amir. He is from Türkiye. He is 19 years old. He is tall and friendly. Amir is a science student, and he likes computers and music.

Every morning, Amir wakes up at 7:00. He takes a shower and eats breakfast in the dormitory kitchen. He usually eats bread, eggs, and fruit. I drink tea, but Amir likes coffee.

After classes, we come back to our room and study together. I read my English books, and Amir works on his computer. In the evening, we sometimes play video games or watch short videos online.

Our room is busy, but we are happy. Amir is a good roommate, and I enjoy living with him.

vocabulary.meaning: a room for several people to sleep in, especially in a school or other institution
vocabulary.example: After the lessons I feel very tired, so I want to go to my room in the dormitory.

vocabulary.meaning: someone you share your room with
vocabulary.example: My roommate in the dormitory is a senior student.

questions.question: Leo and Amir sometimes play video games.
Fill in the blank with a suitable word.
Fill in the blank with a suitable word.
Put the sentences in the correct order.
